title: The Makkers Mod
description: A Minecraft meme & joke mod about the Makkers.
body:
# About the Mod
In this mod, there are various memes and jokes from the YouTube channel Makkers. For example, we have the famous dog "Moos Bouhof" from Joost Bouhof. There is also Knakworst, a Knakworst Butcher and many more things based on knakworst (A Dutch food). The mod adds some food, a new villager type, a villager's jobside block, a tool and some more. 

# About Makkers
Makkers is a Dutch YouTube channel with multiple populair Dutch YouTubers making videos together. This mod is basically all about jokes and memes.

The mod currently has full language support for: English, German & Dutch.
The mod is for Minecraft 1.19.4.
